description: Notes in markdown, visualised as anything
config.title: NoteThink
config.trace.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the extension.
config.showLineNumbers.description: Show line numbers in NoteThink views.
config.watchUnopenedFilesInViewer.descri: Watch the active viewed file for on-disk changes when it isn't open in a text editor (refreshes the viewer when another tool edits it).
config.folderView.viewType.description: Default view type for folder (aggregate) mode. The user default applies in every workspace unless that workspace overrides it.
config.folderView.columnOrder.descriptio: Default kanban column order for folder mode (raw status slugs like 'code-review' or 'done'). Columns not in the list appear after, sorted alphabetically with 'untagged' last.
config.folderView.includeFilter.descript: Glob of files to include in folder mode.
config.folderView.excludeFilter.descript: Glob of files to exclude in folder mode.
config.folderView.maxNotesPerFile.descri: Cap on stories taken from each source file when merging the folder aggregate.
config.folderView.showContextBars.descri: Show context bars above stories in folder mode.
